## Suggestion interface

A suggestion represents a query that has been proposed to the user, due of being popular, matching with the current search query...

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface Suggestion extends NamedModel<'QuerySuggestion' | 'PopularSearch'>, Previewable 
```
<b>Extends:</b> [NamedModel](./x-types.namedmodel.md)<!-- -->&lt;'QuerySuggestion' \| 'PopularSearch'&gt;, [Previewable](./x-types.previewable.md)

|  Property | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [facets](./x-types.suggestion.facets.md) | [Facet](./x-types.facet.md)<!-- -->\[\] | Facets to apply to the <code>query</code> property when searching. |
